subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Assemble and test the project

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Delete the build directory

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Run the unit tests

subcommands.name: assemble
subcommands.description: Assemble the outputs of the project

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Run all checks including tests

subcommands.name: jar
subcommands.description: Assemble a JAR archive of the main classes

subcommands.name: war
subcommands.description: Assemble a WAR archive of the web application

subcommands.name: bootRun
subcommands.description: Run the Spring Boot application

subcommands.name: bootJar
subcommands.description: Assemble an executable JAR with Spring Boot

subcommands.name: classes
subcommands.description: Assemble main classes

subcommands.name: testClasses
subcommands.description: Assemble test classes

subcommands.name: javadoc
subcommands.description: Generate Javadoc API documentation

subcommands.name: dependencies
subcommands.description: Display all dependencies declared in the project

name: --configuration
options.description: The dependency configuration to report

subcommands.name: dependencyInsight
subcommands.description: Display insight into a specific dependency

name: --dependency
options.description: The dependency to show insight for

name: --configuration
options.description: The dependency configuration to resolve

subcommands.name: projects
subcommands.description: Display the sub-projects of the project

subcommands.name: properties
subcommands.description: Display the properties of the project

subcommands.name: tasks
subcommands.description: Display the tasks runnable from the project

name: --all
options.description: Show additional tasks and detail

name: --group
options.description: Show tasks for a specific group

subcommands.name: components
subcommands.description: Display the components produced by the project

subcommands.name: model
subcommands.description: Display the configuration model of the project

subcommands.name: buildEnvironment
subcommands.description: Display all buildscript dependencies declared in the project

subcommands.name: wrapper
subcommands.description: Generate Gradle wrapper files

name: --gradle-version
options.description: The Gradle version to use in the wrapper

name: --distribution-type
options.description: The type of Gradle distribution (bin or all)

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Initialize a new Gradle build

name: --type
options.description: Type of project to generate (java-application, java-library, etc.)

name: --dsl
options.description: DSL to use for build scripts (groovy or kotlin)

name: --test-framework
options.description: Test framework to use (junit, testng, spock, etc.)

name: --project-name
options.description: Name of the generated project

name: --package
options.description: Package for the generated source

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help information about a task

name: --task
options.description: The task to display help for

name: -b
--build-file
options.description: Specify the build file

name: -c
--settings-file
options.description: Specify the settings file

name: -p
--project-dir
options.description: Specify the start directory for Gradle

name: -g
--gradle-user-home
options.description: Specify the Gradle user home directory

name: -x
--exclude-task
options.description: Specify a task to be excluded from execution

name: --parallel
options.description: Build projects in parallel

name: --no-parallel
options.description: Disable parallel project execution

name: --daemon
options.description: Use the Gradle Daemon to run the build

name: --no-daemon
options.description: Do not use the Gradle Daemon

name: --foreground
options.description: Start the Gradle Daemon in the foreground

name: -t
--continuous
options.description: Enable continuous build, re-executing on file changes

name: --build-cache
options.description: Enable the Gradle build cache

name: --no-build-cache
options.description: Disable the Gradle build cache

name: --configure-on-demand
options.description: Configure necessary projects only

name: --no-configure-on-demand
options.description: Disable configure-on-demand

name: --console
options.description: Specify console output type (auto, plain, rich, verbose)

name: -i
--info
options.description: Set log level to info

name: -d
--debug
options.description: Log in debug mode (includes normal stacktrace)

name: -w
--warn
options.description: Set log level to warn

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Log errors only

name: -s
--stacktrace
options.description: Print out the stacktrace for all exceptions

name: -S
--full-stacktrace
options.description: Print out the full stacktrace for all exceptions

name: --scan
options.description: Create a build scan

name: --no-scan
options.description: Disable creation of a build scan

name: --offline
options.description: Execute the build without accessing network resources

name: --refresh-dependencies
options.description: Refresh the state of dependencies

name: --rerun-tasks
options.description: Ignore previously cached task results

name: -m
--dry-run
options.description: Run the builds with all task actions disabled

name: --max-workers
options.description: Configure the number of concurrent workers

name: --profile
options.description: Profile build execution time and generate a report

name: --init-script
options.description: Specify an initialization script

name: -D
options.description: Set a system property (e.g. -Dproperty=value)

name: -P
options.description: Set a project property (e.g. -Pproperty=value)

name: --warning-mode
options.description: Specify warning mode (all, fail, none, summary)
